questions.question: In the past God spoke through the prophets, but in these last days he has spoken through whom?
questions.feedback: In these last days God has spoken to us by his Son.

questions.question: The Son is described as the radiance of God's glory and the exact imprint of what?
questions.feedback: The Son is the radiance of God's glory and the exact imprint of his nature.

questions.question: The author argues that the Son is superior to the angels.
questions.feedback: The Son is much superior to angels, having inherited a more excellent name.

questions.question: God says about the Son: Your throne, O God, is forever and ever, and the scepter of _____ is the scepter of your kingdom.
questions.feedback: The scepter of uprightness is the scepter of his kingdom.

questions.question: Angels are described as ministering _____ sent out to serve those who will inherit salvation.
questions.feedback: Angels are ministering spirits sent to serve the heirs of salvation.
